audit_findings.finding: Original H-001 finding (plaintext API keys in tracked .env) is false positive on current HEAD — file already untracked and ignored. Audit snapshot may have been taken against older commit or misread cross-repo state. Residual risk: credentials were historically committed and remain in git object store; key rotation required out-of-band.
audit_findings.remediation: No code change. User should rotate DEEPSEEK_API_KEY and ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN via provider dashboards since they exist in git history even if removed from HEAD. Consider git-filter-repo if full purge needed.
